retrieved_note: Pilot agent extraction from official public pages and surfaced SOC snippets. Normalize before shipping to UI.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Reversed if PKR 40,000 spent within 60 days of issuance

notes: Spend-based full fee reversal. No public income or balance threshold.
Current public pages were strong on fees and reversal rules, weak on eligibility thresholds.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Reversed if PKR 1,500,000 spent within 12 months

notes: Spend-based full fee reversal within 12 months. No public income or balance threshold.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Priority-marked KHAAS/current-account customers get discounted World Debit Card pricing; non-priority public KFS shows PKR 18,000 annual and PKR 9,000 supplementary.

notes: Latest surfaced conventional KFS shows non-priority World Debit pricing at PKR 18,000 annual and PKR 9,000 supplementary.
BOP KHAAS public pages still show discounted pricing for qualifying KHAAS/Priority relationships rather than a single universal fee.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Free annual fee for KHAAS customers marked as Priority.

notes: KHAAS current account threshold appears as PKR 2,000,000 for individuals/sole proprietors.
KHAAS saving eligibility also mentions PKR 500,000 monthly salary and PKR 500,000 initial deposit.
Latest surfaced conventional KFS shows PKR 3,000 issuance/renewal/replacement and PKR 1,400 supplementary.
New customers must open an account first; no numeric salary or balance threshold was surfaced on the public card page.
Latest surfaced conventional KFS shows PKR 3,600 annual fee and PKR 1,500 supplementary.
Recovered as an account-linked generic current/savings debit card rather than a salary-gated product.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Reversed if PKR 100,000 spent within 60 days of issuance

notes: Spend-based full fee reversal. No public income or balance threshold.
Public pages were strong on fees and reversal rules, but weak on eligibility thresholds.
Latest surfaced conventional KFS shows PKR 6,000 annual fee and PKR 2,500 supplementary.
Recovered as an account-linked generic current/savings debit card rather than a salary-gated product.
Latest surfaced conventional KFS shows PKR 2,800 annual fee.
Current forms use Classic where older BOP forms used Silver, so this is the best current alias target for Mastercard Silver Debit Card.
No public BOP page or PDF found in this pass that defensibly states a universal salary or balance threshold for this generic account-linked card.

cards.card_name: BOP Taqwa Platinum Islamic Debit Card
notes: Latest surfaced Islamic KFS shows PKR 6,000 issuance/renewal/replacement and PKR 2,500 supplementary for Platinum debit.
This is an Islamic account-linked Platinum tier rather than a standalone retail product page.
PKR 300,000 salary threshold is the surfaced Taqwa BOP@Work route rather than a universal card rule.

cards.card_name: BOP Taqwa KHAAS Platinum Islamic Debit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Zero issuance and renewal for priority-marked KHAAS Islamic accounts; non-priority public Islamic KFS shows PKR 6,000 plus PKR 3,000 supplementary.

notes: Islamic KFS surfaces zero issuance/renewal for priority-marked KHAAS Platinum and PKR 3,000 supplementary; non-priority pricing still appears separately.
Islamic/KHAAS wrapper around the KHAAS platinum concept, distinct from the conventional KHAAS Platinum record.

cards.card_name: BOP Taqwa World Islamic Debit Card

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Priority-marked Islamic KHAAS accounts get discounted World Debit pricing; surfaced Islamic KFS shows PKR 18,000 non-priority annual pricing.

notes: Latest surfaced Islamic KFS shows PKR 18,000 annual for non-priority World Debit; KHAAS/Priority relationships still receive discounted pricing.
Recovered as an Islamic account-linked World tier rather than from a standalone card landing page.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Issued free with BOP Naaz Current Account; current public KFS shows PKR 2,400 on renewal/replacement and PKR 1,100 supplementary.

notes: Women-account-linked card marketed as Naaz Debit Card.
The public Naaz page states free issuance with Naaz Current Account, while current KFS PDFs now surface PKR 2,400 renewal/replacement and PKR 1,100 supplementary.
The PKR 1,000 threshold comes from the surfaced Taqwa Naaz Saving opening amount rather than a universal card rule.

requirements.annual_fee_waiver_rule: Reversed if PKR 70,000 spent within 60 days of issuance

notes: Co-branded Lahore Qalandars credit card. Spend-based full fee reversal.

gaps: Credit-card salary, balance, and age criteria were not cleanly surfaced on the official pages found.
Debit-card fee data is fragmented across card pages and SOC snippets.
Age criteria were not clearly surfaced for the consumer cards found.
